title: ReviewRunResults
description: Output schema for the skill-reviewer plugin. Judges are a generic map keyed by rubric file stem (e.g. 'description', 'content') — one entry per rubric. Scoring contains one component per judge; weights come from each rubric's top-level 'weight' field.

judges.description: Map of rubric stem → judge result. One entry per rubric file discovered in ./rubrics/. Absent when no judges have run yet.

reviewScore.description: Overall review score 0–100. Computed as floor(100 * weighted sum of component scores). Weights come from the rubric files (judge components). Absent if the scoring block is incomplete.

scoring.description: Per-component normalized scores — one entry per rubric file. Weights come from each rubric's top-level 'weight' field.

id.description: Component id: the rubric file stem of the judge component.

weight.description: Component weight: the top-level 'weight' from the judge's rubric file.

normalized.description: Normalized score for this component (0–1): the judge's normalizedScore.

score.description: Numeric score within the rubric's scale range.

scores.description: Map of dimension id → score. Must include every dimension from the rubric.

success.description: True if the judge ran and produced a valid evaluation. False when the judge branch failed and returns an errorMessage.

errorMessage.description: Error message if success is false.

evaluation.description: Judge output. Present when success is true.

weightedScore.description: Weighted average of dimension scores. sum(score * weight) / sum(weight).

scale.description: The rubric's scoring scale, copied from the rubric file's top-level scale field.
